entries.en: Good morning madam! Pleased to meet you. (formal)
entries.drill: Say it aloud 3×, then swap: signore (sir). Always Lei with elders.

entries.it: Mi chiamo Marcello, lavoro con l'agenzia.
entries.en: My name is Marcello, I work with the agency.
entries.drill: Say 3×, then add your firm's name in the slot.
Say 3×, then extend: "...siamo qui da tre generazioni" (three generations here).
Pair it: Come sta? → Bene, grazie. E Lei? Both parts aloud 3×.
Swap the noun: che bella casa, che bella cucina, che bel terreno.
The fence-line opener. Say 3× with real enthusiasm — flat delivery kills it.

entries.en: How long have you lived here?
entries.drill: Say 3×, then practise hearing answers: vent'anni (20), trent'anni (30), quarant'anni (40).

entries.it: Che bella casa — si vede l'amore.
entries.en: What a beautiful house — you can see the love.
entries.drill: Say 3× slowly. This is a heart line — pause after 'casa'.

entries.en: May I offer you my help?
entries.drill: Say 3×, then soften: "se posso aiutarvi..." (if I can help you...).

entries.it: Grazie mille per il vostro tempo.
entries.en: Thank you so much for your time.
entries.drill: Your exit line. Pair with: Arrivederci, a presto! 3× together.
Say 3×, then the warmer version: Ci vediamo presto, signora.

entries.it: la cucina · il bagno · la camera da letto
entries.en: the kitchen · the bathroom · the bedroom
entries.drill: Walk your own house naming each room aloud in Italian.

entries.it: il soggiorno · il giardino · il garage
entries.en: the living room · the garden · the garage
entries.drill: Point at each on a floorplan (or your house) and name it 3×.

entries.en: the cellar — sacred ground, where the wine and sauce live
entries.drill: Use in a sentence: "E la cantina? Posso vederla?" — guaranteed smile at an appraisal.
Say 3×: "Un bel terreno grande" — big blocks are gold in the Italian belt.
Describe 3 rooms of a listing aloud using all three words.
Say 3×, then: "completamente ristrutturato" (fully renovated). Roll the r.
Say 3×, then pair: "una casa in ottime condizioni".

entries.it: vendere la casa / comprare una casa
entries.en: to sell the house / to buy a house
entries.drill: Conjugate aloud: vendo, vende, vendiamo — then same for compro.

entries.en: How much is my house worth? — THE question you'll be asked
entries.drill: Practise your answer: "Posso dirvelo — una valutazione è gratuita." 3×.
Your core offer. Full line 3×: "Una valutazione è gratuita e senza impegno."

entries.en: the market is strong right now
entries.drill: Say 3×, then the opposite for honesty: "il mercato è più calmo" (calmer).
Sentence: "La casa va all'asta sabato." (The house goes to auction Saturday.) 3×.
Sentence: "Abbiamo ricevuto un'offerta." (We've received an offer.) 3×.
Say both 3×, then: "Ho molti compratori che cercano qui." (I have many buyers looking here.)
Pair with your rule: "Per il contratto, parliamo in inglese." 3×.
Say 3×. Sentence: "La caparra è il dieci per cento." (The deposit is ten percent.)
Full intro 3×: "Sono agente immobiliare qui nella zona."
Say 3× SLOWLY — the pace is the message with downsizers.

entries.it: Capisco, è la casa di una vita.
entries.en: I understand — it's the home of a lifetime.
entries.drill: Say 3×. Pause before 'una vita'. This line earns trust; don't rush it.
Say 3×, then earn it: "...vi spiego tutto, passo per passo."

entries.it: Parlo italiano e inglese — vi spiego tutto.
entries.en: I speak Italian and English — I'll explain everything.
entries.drill: Your differentiator. 5× until it's effortless.

entries.en: Talk it over with the family.
entries.drill: Say 3×, then add: "...con calma" (take your time). Never pressure the downsizers.

entries.it: I vostri figli possono chiamarmi quando vogliono.
entries.en: Your children can call me whenever they like.
entries.drill: Say 3× — the kids are the real decision-makers. This line reaches them.
Say 3× while actually miming handing a card — gesture locks the phrase in.

entries.it: Cosa cercate? Qualcosa di più piccolo?
entries.en: What are you looking for? Something smaller?
entries.drill: The downsizer question. 3×, then alternatives: più moderno, più vicino ai figli.

entries.it: Una casa più facile da gestire.
entries.en: A house that's easier to manage.
entries.drill: Say 3× — this is what downsizing IS to them. Use their words back.

entries.it: Vi accompagno io, passo per passo.
entries.en: I'll walk you through it, step by step.
entries.drill: Say 3×, slow on "passo per passo" — it's a promise, not a slogan.

entries.it: Per il contratto, parliamo in inglese così è tutto chiaro.
entries.en: For the contract, let's speak English so everything is clear.
entries.drill: Compliance line — 5×. Italian for warmth, English for contracts, always.
Say it with a smile 3×. They'll smile back — promise.

entries.it: Se mai volete sapere quanto vale la casa, la valutazione è gratuita.
entries.en: If you ever want to know what the house is worth, the appraisal is free.
entries.drill: The full fence-line close. 5× until one smooth breath.

entries.en: May I take a few photos?
entries.drill: Say 3× — you'll need it at every appraisal. Add: "...per la valutazione".

entries.en: When would be a good time?
entries.drill: Booking line. 3×, then offer slots: "martedì o giovedì?"

entries.en: I'll come back Thursday, is that okay?
entries.drill: Swap days aloud: lunedì, martedì, mercoledì, giovedì, venerdì, sabato.

entries.it: il lunedì · il martedì · il mercoledì
entries.drill: All seven days aloud 2×, forwards then backwards.

entries.en: this morning · this afternoon · this evening
entries.drill: Make 3 sentences: "Posso passare stasera?" etc.

entries.it: la settimana prossima / il mese prossimo
entries.drill: Sentence 3×: "La casa va sul mercato la settimana prossima."

entries.en: one hundred · one thousand · one million
entries.drill: Count prices aloud: settecentomila, novecentomila, un milione e centomila.

entries.en: nine hundred and fifty thousand dollars
entries.drill: Say 3 realistic Adelaide prices aloud in Italian — slow is fine, accurate matters.
Complete it aloud with 3 different prices. Numbers under pressure = credibility.
Use after estimates 3×: "Vale un milione, più o meno."
Say 3× — your honest hedge when asked for a number on the spot.
Say 3× with confidence — three small words that close trust gaps.
Say 3×, then alternative: "Non si preoccupi." (Don't worry — formal.)
Say 3× gently. Tone matters more than grammar here.

entries.en: Can you repeat that for me, please?
entries.drill: Your lifeline when dialect flies past you. 5× until automatic.
Say 3×. Using it shows effort, not weakness.

entries.en: How do you say... in Italian?
entries.drill: Ask it about 3 house features you don't know yet. They LOVE teaching.
Say 3×, then add: "...per la mia famiglia e il mio lavoro." Instant warmth.
Adapt to YOUR family's region and say 3× — your #1 rapport line.

entries.en: What part of Italy are you from?
entries.drill: Ask 3×, practise hearing: Calabria, Campania, Veneto, Sicilia, Abruzzo.
Say 3×, then prove it: name 3 local landmarks in the same breath.
Say 3×, then: "Sono cresciuto qui." (I grew up here.) Use whichever is true.
Sentence 3×: "Ho venduto la casa del vostro vicino." — the strongest social proof there is.

entries.it: Ho venduto una casa qui vicino.
entries.en: I sold a house near here.
entries.drill: Say 3× — pair it with the actual street name when it becomes true.
Ask 3×: "I figli abitano vicino?" (Do the kids live close?) — downsizer gold.
Say 3× — it's their value system in five words. Mean it when you say it.
Say 3× — ask it often; Italians respect being consulted, not sold to.
Say 3× — agreeing gracefully in their language disarms objections.
Say 3×, slow on 'perfettamente' — empathy line for tough conversations.
Say 3×, then pair: "Non c'è fretta." Respect = patience spoken aloud.

entries.it: Prenda tutto il tempo che serve.
entries.en: Take all the time you need. (formal)
entries.drill: Say 3× — the anti-pressure close that wins Italian-family listings.

entries.en: May I come by next week?
entries.drill: The follow-up ask. 3×, then swap: domani, giovedì, dopo Pasqua.
Say 3×, then: "...e li guardiamo insieme" (and we'll look at them together).
Say 3× — collaboration verb; you're beside them, not across from them.
Phone opener 3×: "Signora, ho una bella notizia!" — practise the energy.

entries.en: We have a very good offer.
entries.drill: Say 3×, then the follow-up: "Che cosa ne pensa?"
Say it once, loud. Then learn the sentence: "La casa è venduta — complimenti!"
Say 3×: "Complimenti, signora — è un ottimo risultato."
Say 3× — your settlement-day phrase. Pair with complimenti.
Sentence 3×: "Questa zona è molto richiesta." (This area is in high demand.)
Say 3×: "Athelstone è molto richiesta adesso." Use your real suburbs.

entries.it: vicino alle scuole / ai negozi / alla chiesa
entries.en: close to schools / shops / the church
entries.drill: All three aloud 2× — the church one matters in your farm area.
Describe a suburb 3×: "È una zona tranquilla e sicura."
Fence-line gold. 3×: "Che bell'orto! Tutto fatto da Lei?" (All your own work?)

entries.en: the fig tree / the olive tree / the grapevine
entries.drill: Name all three aloud 2× — knowing them = instant insider status in the belt.

entries.it: fatto a mano / fatto in casa
entries.drill: Say 3×: "Fatto in casa? Complimenti!" — works for sauce, wine, salami, pasta.

entries.en: May I taste? Just a little!
entries.drill: Say with a grin 3×. Accepting food/wine = accepting friendship. Never refuse twice.
Say 3× — your line after the inevitable espresso and biscotti.
Your warm goodbye. 3×, then full exit: "Grazie di tutto — saluti alla famiglia!"
Confirm appointments aloud 3×, swapping days — locking the next touch in Italian.

entries.it: Mi farebbe un grande piacere aiutarvi.
entries.en: It would be a great pleasure to help you.
entries.drill: The graceful listing ask. 5× until smooth — this is your closer.
